hook.summary: Fast-paced rhythm gameplay with 'PERFECT' feedback and upbeat pop music.
hook.visual_action: Black tiles fall down a four-lane track and are tapped in sync with the music against a blue and purple gradient background.
hook.voiceover_transcript: You're all I can think of, every drop I drink of

scene_flow: Introduction to the rhythm mechanics with single taps on black tiles.
Introduction of a long-press blue note requiring sustained contact.
Increasing speed and complexity of tile patterns as the song progresses.
Continuous 'PERFECT' feedback loops to reinforce player success.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy rhythm-based music games and pop music.
